atomic_facts.fact: The scrapbook is open to a two-page spread.
The left page has a black background with small white speckles.
There are five green heart shapes arranged horizontally at the top of the left page.
The right page features a rectangular section with yellow circles.
A hand is visible at the bottom edge, touching the book.
Red ribbon tabs are visible at the top edge of the pages.

spatial: The open scrapbook dominates the center of the frame, resting on a floral tablecloth. The left page features green hearts at the top and a folded element at the bottom. The right page has a yellow pattern at the top and a text card below. A hand is at the bottom center, and a grey tool is on the far right.

visible_entities.desc: Left hand with silver watch, holding a green paper heart
visible_entities.action: holding and placing a green paper heart onto the left page of the scrapbook

visible_entities.desc: Open scrapbook with black pages and various paper crafts
Right hand, partially visible
visible_entities.action: resting near the bottom of the scrapbook

visible_entities.desc: Floral patterned fabric background
visible_entities.action: serving as the surface for the scrapbook

atomic_facts.fact: A hand is holding a light green, heart-shaped paper cutout.
The scrapbook has a black page on the left with white speckles.
The right page of the scrapbook has a yellow and white circular pattern.
There is a small, folded paper object on the left page.
The person is wearing a silver-colored watch on their left wrist.

spatial: The scene is a top-down view of an open scrapbook on a floral surface. A hand enters from the left, holding a paper heart over the left page. Another hand is visible at the bottom.

visible_entities.desc: A person's hands with medium skin tone
visible_entities.action: holding and closing a handmade scrapbook
visible_entities.position: bottom center and center of the frame

visible_entities.desc: A handmade scrapbook with a black cover and colorful internal pages
A floral patterned surface, likely a tablecloth or bedsheet
A grey ruler or straight edge

atomic_facts.fact: The scrapbook is open in the first frame, revealing a left page with a black background and a green heart, and a right page with yellow circles.
The scrapbook is closed in the second frame, showing its plain black back cover.
The text 'NOTE' is visible upside down on the right page of the open scrapbook.
Multiple colorful ribbons are attached to the edges of the scrapbook pages.

spatial: The scene is a top-down view of a scrapbook on a floral surface. Hands enter from the bottom to manipulate the book. A ruler is positioned vertically along the right edge.
